properties.titulo_evento: Huge fascist-era underground cisterns draw Western special forces to Italy for tunnel training
properties.descricao: After resisting 150 bombing runs by the Allies in the Second World War, the cisterns continued to be used by the Italian Air Force to hold aviation fuel.

properties.descricao: Defence Minister John Healey said on Monday that Prime Minister Keir Starmer was determined to publish it before a July 7 NATO summit.

properties.titulo_evento: Barcelona teenager Lamine Yamal wins La Liga Player of the Season award
properties.descricao: Lamine Yamal will be an integral part of Spain's World Cup 2026 challenge and was key in Barcelona's La Liga defence.

properties.titulo_evento: WFP: War on Iran pushing millions towards hunger
properties.descricao: The US-Israeli war on Iran could tip up to 45 million people into acute hunger, the UN's WFP warns.

properties.descricao: As US and Iran pursue talks, both signal they are still ready to use force against each other.

properties.descricao: The Israeli army also issues new forced displacement orders for several towns and villages in southern Lebanon.

properties.titulo_evento: Fujimori vs Sanchez: What to know about Peru’s presidential run-off election
properties.descricao: The run-off follows a tumultuous first round of voting, which saw long lines, delayed results and accusations of fraud.

properties.titulo_evento: How the US naval blockade has bled Iran of nearly $6bn in oil revenues
properties.descricao: Iran is exporting less than one-sixth of the oil it was shipping before the war began.

properties.descricao: European Commission president warns that the maritime drone attack was a 'direct consequence' of the Russia-Ukraine war.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine strikes cargo ships and admits Romania drone blast
properties.descricao: Ukraine says it struck five ships carrying illegal cargo in the Sea of Azov and in coastal waters of Russian-occupied territories.

properties.titulo_evento: Xi Jinping to meet Kim Jong Un in rare visit to North Korea
properties.descricao: It is taking place weeks after Xi met the leaders of the US and Russia - two countries that loom large over North Korea's foreign policy.

properties.titulo_evento: Romania: TV reporter flees live on air after drone explosion in Constanța
properties.descricao: A live television report from Romania's Black Sea port of Constanța was abruptly interrupted on 5 June after a maritime drone exploded nearby, heightening concerns over the regional impact of the war in Ukraine.

properties.titulo_evento: Venezuela's Dancing Devils revive centuries-old Corpus Christi rite
properties.descricao: Children making their First Communion were accompanied by masked "Dancing Devils" in Tarmas, Venezuela. The centuries-old Corpus Christi celebration symbolises the triumph of good over evil and remains a key cultural tradition.

properties.titulo_evento: Beijing slams US comments on Tiananmen Square crackdown as 'smear' of China
properties.descricao: On 4 June 1989, the Chinese government sent troops and tanks to crush protests calling for political reform in and around the central square in the capital Beijing.

properties.titulo_evento: Gaza city residents survey destruction after overnight Israeli airstrike
properties.descricao: Gaza residents surveyed extensive damage on 4 June after an overnight Israeli airstrike hit an apartment in the Sheikh Radwan neighbourhood of Gaza City.

properties.titulo_evento: Gaza: Families mourn victims after overnight Israeli strikes that killed at least nine
properties.descricao: Families gathered in Gaza City to mourn relatives killed on 4 June after overnight Israeli airstrikes in Gaza City, according to local hospitals.

properties.titulo_evento: Paris and Berlin push 'gradual integration' plan into EU ahead of Balkans summit
properties.descricao: Merz and Macron pitch "building blocks" approach to EU enlargement to revitalise accession talks, ahead of this week's Western Balkans summit.

properties.descricao: EU governments are considering restricting temporary protection for military-age Ukrainian men, as member states debate balancing support, integration pressures and Ukraine's manpower needs.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukrainian drone explodes in Romanian sea port

properties.titulo_evento: North Korea quietly ramps up its nuclear program
properties.descricao: With Washington's attention elsewhere, North Korea has slowly been building up its nuclear weapons program. This week, Kim Jong Un took a publicity tour of a new nuclear fuel facility while promising to build more bombs.

properties.titulo_evento: Iran at war: Stability masks deepening crises
properties.descricao: One hundred days after the start of the Iran war, the Islamic Republic appears stable. But beneath the surface, economic strain, social unrest and growing repression point to deeper instability.

properties.titulo_evento: Germany's Iran war lessons after 100 days
properties.descricao: The war waged by the US and Israel against Iran has now lasted 100 days. In that time, German Chancellor Friedrich Merz has drastically changed his stance on the war.

properties.titulo_evento: Middle East: UN doubles Lebanon aid appeal amid Israel war
properties.descricao: The UN says it is seeking an additional $331.5 million to tackle a worsening humanitarian crisis in Lebanon. Meanwhile, Israel is carrying out fresh strikes on the south of the country. Follow DW for the latest.

properties.titulo_evento: Ukraine: Marine drone explodes in Romanian port
properties.descricao: A naval drone exploded in the Romanian port of Constanta on Friday morning, causing no injuries. Ukraine's navy claimed ownership of the device which it said had been "jammed" by Russian electronic warfare. DW has more.

properties.titulo_evento: EU to advance expansion plans at Balkans summit
properties.descricao: European leaders are gathering in Montenegro with EU expansion high on the agenda. Montenegro is a leading candidate for accession while, further east, Ukraine and Moldova also harbor ambitions.

properties.titulo_evento: Germans at Russia's SPIEF: Who's really there?
properties.descricao: Russian officials and media claim German businesses are comming back to the St. Petersburg Economic Forum despite the war in Ukraine. But who is actually attending Russia's flagship event this year?

properties.titulo_evento: Germany's UN defeat: What went wrong?
properties.descricao: Austria and Portugal have won seats on the UN Security Council, ending Germany's 40-year streak. DW examines the foreign policy questions raised by Berlin's defeat.
